channel.title: visualstudiocode on Notities
channel.description: Recent content in visualstudiocode on Notities

item.title: Quick git commands to add a local repository in Visual Studio Code to GitHub
item.description: T﻿ype in the terminal of Visual Studio Code #﻿ git init #﻿ git add . #﻿ git commit -m “initial commit” C﻿reate a new repository on GitHub #﻿ git remote add origin <the new .git URL> Example: #﻿ git remote add orign https://github.com/martijnvandenboom/Java_tools.git #﻿ git push -u origin main
